summary: AgentForge v3.1 Build Scheduling testing complete. All features working: Extended 15h+ build time, scheduled builds with datetime picker, War Room COMMANDER scheduling messages, start/cancel scheduled builds.

issues: Console warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue from previous version

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/build-stages/unreal - total 930 minutes (15h 30m) - exceeds 12+ hour requirement
✅ POST /api/builds/start with scheduled_at - creates build with status='scheduled'
✅ GET /api/builds/scheduled - returns builds ready to start
✅ War Room shows COMMANDER scheduled message with clock emoji and build time
✅ Cannot start-scheduled a non-scheduled build (returns 400 error)
✅ Frontend: Simulate button opens simulation dialog
✅ Frontend: 'Schedule for tonight (12+ hour build)' checkbox visible after simulation
✅ Frontend: datetime-local input for schedule time available
✅ Frontend: 'Schedule Overnight Build' button appears when scheduling enabled
✅ Frontend: War Room tab shows COMMANDER SCHEDULED message
✅ Frontend: Build stages displayed in War Room (Project Setup, Core Framework, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All v3.1 scheduling features accessible and functional)

seed_data_creation: Test scheduled builds created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v3.1 Build Scheduling fully tested. Key features: 1) Build stages total 930 minutes (15h 30m) for both Unreal and Unity engines, 2) POST /api/builds/start with 'scheduled_at' parameter creates a scheduled build, 3) GET /api/builds/scheduled returns builds ready to start, 4) POST /api/builds/{build_id}/start-scheduled starts scheduled builds, 5) War Room shows COMMANDER message with scheduling details. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_v31_scheduling.py covers all v3.1 endpoints.

extended_build_time.details: 8 stages totaling 930 minutes (15h 30m) for both Unreal and Unity

endpoints_tested: POST /api/builds/start with scheduled_at - creates scheduled build
scheduled_builds.notes: Schedule checkbox with datetime picker appears after running simulation

war_room_scheduling_message.message_format: ⏰ Build SCHEDULED for {time}! Target: {engine}. Estimated time: {duration}. Get some rest, I'll handle this.
war_room_scheduling_message.notes: COMMANDER automatically posts scheduling message when build is scheduled
